interfaces.label: threshold seam
interfaces.breach_law: BREACH only when a surface, gate, seam, cut, or boundary is named.

interfaces.label: scale seam
interfaces.breach_law: TRANSLATE scale without cutting material continuity.

interfaces.label: surface seam
interfaces.breach_law: DEPOSIT texture residue after every transition.

patches.summary: The DWIG Recursive Loop: A 1970s Panavision Continuous-Take. No cuts. Previous pixels must become current matter. Video file: Seedance 20 - The DWIG Recursive…

patches.vector: approach seam, puncture interface, carry residue through

commands: P01 [00.00-06.12s] Perception-Image. HINGE: threshold. LOCK on diff. FLOW through burst, grid, mean, motion via vector: hold with accumulating pressure. BREACH threshold seam at cut when trigger=duration_window, perception_hold. CARRY OVER surface continuity. DEPOSIT surface residue; threshold residue; cut residue. DO NOT CUT unless identity has already crossed the breach.

P02 [06.12-12.25s] Opsign. HINGE: threshold. LOCK on diff. FLOW through burst, grid, mean, motion via vector: hold with accumulating pressure. BREACH surface seam at surface when trigger=surface. CARRY OVER surface continuity. DEPOSIT surface residue. DO NOT CUT unless identity has already crossed the breach.

P03 [12.25-15.04s] Action-Image. HINGE: threshold. LOCK on diff. FLOW through burst, grid, mean, motion via vector: approach seam, puncture interface, carry residue through. BREACH threshold seam at cut when trigger=surface, threshold, vector. CARRY OVER surface continuity. DEPOSIT surface residue; threshold residue; cut residue. DO NOT CUT unless identity has already crossed the breach.
